prompt: Why does this code fail to compile?
error_message: error[E0369]: binary operation `+` cannot be applied to type `Point`
explanation: You can't use the + operator on custom structs by default. Define an extension trait and implement it to enable adding two Points.

prompt: Why does this code fail to compile?
error_message: error[E0502]: cannot borrow `v` as mutable because it is also borrowed as immutable
explanation: Cannot have both an immutable and a mutable borrow of the same value at the same time. Dropping the immutable borrow resolves this.
